name: PR Description Generator
description: Generate standardized PR description when agent execution completes on a feature branch

then.prompt: Generate a PR description for the current branch using FEMSA standard template. Include: ## Qué cambia, ## Por qué (reference Jira ticket from branch name), ## Cómo probar (step-by-step), ## Tipo de cambio (checkboxes), ## Checklist. Extract ticket ID from branch name. Summarize all commits on this branch vs develop.
